Engineering Colleges, IIT Colleges

Overview

Institute NameIndian Institute of Technology, Tirupati
Also Known AsIIT-TP
Institute TypeGovernment

IIT Tirupati: Admission | Ranking | Fees

Also Known as

Also known as IIT Tirupati, IITTP and IIT TP.

ADDRESS

Indian Institute of Technology Tirupati, Yerpedu – Venkatagiri Road, Yerpedu Post, Chittoor District, Andhra Pradesh – 517619

Nearest Airport and Railway Station

Tirupati International Airport
11.5 km
Yerpedu Railway Station
4 km
Tirupati Railway Station
29 km

CAMPUS FACILITIES

RANKING

BodyCategoryRank (Year)
LatestPrevious
National Ranking
NIRF Overall Rankings151-200 (2025)101-150 (2024)
NIRF Engineering Rankings57 (2025)61 (2024)

MODE OF ADMISSION

  • Candidates must qualify the JEE (Main) exam and then appear for the JEE (Advanced) exam.
  • Candidates must secure at least 75% marks (65% for SC/ST/PwD) in Class XII OR be within the category-wise top 20 percentile in their respective Class XII board examination. For more details, refer to the JEE Advanced Performance Criteria in Class XII.
  • Admissions are based on the rank obtained in JEE (Advanced) through JoSAA Counselling.

COURSES OFFERED

Please choose the course.

B.E./B.Tech. - 4 Years

  • Chemical Engineering
  • Civil Engineering
  • Computer Science and Engineering
  • Electrical Engineering
  • Engineering Physics
  • Mechanical Engineering

FEE STRUCTURE

Institute Fee

ParticularsAmount
Caution Money (One-Time, Refundable)₹2,000
One-Time Fees₹6,550
Tuition Fee (per Semester)₹1,00,000
Other Fees (per Semester)₹10,100
Annual Fees₹700
Total₹1,19,350

Hostel Fee

ParticularsAmount
Hostel Caution Money (One-Time, Refundable)₹3,000
Hostel Seat Rent (per Semester)₹7,000
Electricity & Water Charges (per Semester)₹800
Other Charges (per Semester)₹250
Mess Advance (per Semester)₹18,850
Total₹29,900

Fee Waivers

  • 100% Tuition Fee waiver for SC/ST/PwD students.
  • 100% Tuition Fee remission for Most Economically Backward students with family income less than ₹1 lakh per annum.
  • 2/3rd Tuition Fee remission for Other Economically Backward students with family income between ₹1 lakh to ₹5 lakh per annum.

PLACEMENTS

  • 2024
  • Older

Highlights

  • Rs. 41.64 lakhs per annum offered to 3 students by Accenture Japan
  • Rs. 36.42 lakhs per annum offered to 2 students by Texas Instruments
  • Rs. 34.40 lakhs per annum offered to 3 students by PayPal
  • Rs. 30.00 lakhs per annum offered to 3 students by Sprinklr
  • Rs. 30.00 lakhs per annum offered to 1 student by Razor Group
  • Rs. 26.64 lakhs per annum offered to 8 students by BNY
  • Rs. 21.60 lakhs per annum offered to 1 student by UKG
